html:
Exclusive to:

The Inviting Formations are naturally spawning objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. One of each type will spawn on the Lunar Island in the Lunar Mine biome.

They can be mined to obtain the different pieces of the Celestial Altar.

Their positions can be indicated by the Astral Detector.

Trivia

  • The Inviting Formations were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.


DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
“There's something trapped inside.”
–Wilson, when examining any Inviting Formation
“Something inside is calling for me.”
–Willow, when examining any Inviting Formation
“Special things is trapped inside!”
–Wolfgang, when examining any Inviting Formation
“I sense a presence within...”
–Wendy, when examining any Inviting Formation
“PLEASE EXECUTE COMMAND: CLEAVE STONE”
–WX-78, when examining any Inviting Formation
“I think I had best mine it out.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining any Inviting Formation
“There's a little whisper coming from inside.”
–Woodie, when examining any Inviting Formation
“The thing inside wants out.”
–Maxwell, when examining any Inviting Formation
“The göds call me tö it, I shall nöt resist.”
–Wigfrid, when examining any Inviting Formation
“Oh no, someone's trapped inside that rock!”
–Webber, when examining any Inviting Formation
“There's something inside that wants out.”
–Warly, when examining any Inviting Formation
“Trapped?”
–Wormwood, when examining any Inviting Formation
“Somethin' inside is itching to get out.”
–Winona, when examining any Inviting Formation
“There's a surprise inside!”
–Wortox, when examining any Inviting Formation
“Hello?”
–Wurt, when examining any Inviting Formation
“I think there's something in there...”
–Walter, when examining any Inviting Formation
“There's definitely something stuck in there. I wonder...",”
–Wanda, when examining any Inviting Formation
The Inviting Formations are naturally spawning objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. One of each type will spawn on the Lunar Island in the Lunar Mine biome.
They can be mined to obtain the different pieces of the Celestial Altar.
Their positions can be indicated by the Astral Detector.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Inviting Formations were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
